name: 1'6"x2'6" Florissimo Half-Circle Outdoor Door Mat - Threshold™
description:
Enjoy a beautiful entryway every day with the Florissimo Half-Circle Outdoor Door Mat from Threshold™. Designed in half circle shape, this doormat is covered with colorful flowers illustration for an attractive look. Made with 100% coir, this medium-pile rug is easy to shake clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
